title: PvP Knife
description:
This texture pack change your sword to a small one without changing anything other
Mini sword 🗡️
body:
# description 📑
This texture pack is for PVP players it change the texture of every sword in Minecraft without changing others it helps when you PVP with a sword.
# advantages 📈
- Don't change any other tools used for Pvp (Axe).
- Improve low usage off computer resources.
- Vanilla style experience.
- Recommended for easier PVP experience.
- Small file size.
- Regular updates to remove bugs and beter resource pack.
- Bow style 🏹

**A picture of this texture pack.**

![1.0.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c859cd6e1688734a3a48df8696528402370fcbda.png)
